_source: IHKE3409S01 (其他檢驗結果) — synthetic, two hospitals reporting the same NHI 醫令碼 09027C (Creatinine) with different free-text labels
_note: Demonstrates the 'Crea' vs 'Crea,' SMART-app grouping problem. Both rows share ordeR_CODE='09027C' so the adapter outputs the same `code` field, and downstream SMART apps will see them as the same lab test even though the hospital free-text differs. The trailing comma is also normalized out of the display.
